Description: Player base attribute (Strength, Agility, Technique, or Intelligence) at level 1
Character or enemy level (1-based integer)
Flat amount added to each attribute per player level
Player base max health at level 1
Flat amount added to player max health per level
Character base max health before equipment (baseHealth + (level - 1) × healthPerLevel)

The attribute that gets +3 on level-up; determined by equipped weapon (Mace→STR, Sword→AGI, Dagger→TEC, Wand→INT)
Multiplier applied to healthPerLevel on level-up by class (Barbarian, Warrior, Rogue, Wizard)
Character level used in XP formulas (same as level)

Description: Per-enemy stat multipliers from Enemies.json (health, strength, agility, technique, intelligence, armor)
Global multipliers applied to all enemies after scaling: HealthMultiplier, DamageMultiplier, ArmorMultiplier, SpeedMultiplier
Per-level scaling for enemies: Health, Attributes (all four), Armor
Per-enemy level-1 max HP as % of baseline (e.g. 125 = 125%). When null, 100 × archetype.Health
Per-enemy HP gained per level as % of baseline. When null, derived from scalingPerLevel.health
Enemy base health at level 1 = baseline.Health × (healthPercent / 100)
Enemy base attribute at level 1 = (baseline × archetype × overrides) for STR/AGI/TEC/INT
Enemy base armor at level 1 = (baseline.Armor × archetype.Armor × overrides.Armor)

Gold added to reward per enemy level
XP added to per-enemy XP reward per level
